name: app
purpose: Next.js App Router root — route layout, root page, and 6 feature route segments (admin, celebration-demo, colors, dev, journal, meetings).
notes: Root layout.tsx + page.tsx at top level; globals.css present (global stylesheet). 6 route-segment subdirs. File count: 10 (9 tsx + 1 css). No Claude-Code-adjacent artifacts found.

name: components
purpose: Shared React component library — 18 feature-domain subdirectories covering all major UI areas (admin, auth, celebrations, desktop, dev, growth, home, journal, maps, meetings, notebook, onboarding, providers, pwa, settings, status, ui, widgets).
notes: Largest product dir by file count (116 files). Heavily TSX-dominant (109 tsx, 7 ts). 18 subdirs covering every product domain. No Claude-Code-adjacent artifacts found. lib/hooks/ subdir is React hooks (product hooks, not Claude hooks — contains use-tab-refresh.ts).

name: lib
purpose: App-layer utility library — non-component TypeScript modules organized by concern: auth, config, contexts, db, hooks, security, types, utils.
notes: 34 files (33 ts + 1 tsx). 8 subdirs. lib/hooks/ contains React custom hooks (product hooks, NOT Claude hooks — confirmed single file use-tab-refresh.ts). lib/security/ subdir worth noting for D19b cross-reference if security utilities have sanitization patterns relevant to JASON-OS port analysis. No Claude-Code-adjacent artifacts found.

name: src
purpose: Auto-generated Firebase DataConnect client SDK — contains generated TypeScript bindings (index.d.ts, index.cjs.js), ESM and React subpackage dirs, and README.
notes: 15 files (5 json, 4 md, 4 js, 2 ts). Single subdir: src/dataconnect-generated/ which contains package.json, index.cjs.js, index.d.ts, README.md, esm/, react/ subdirs — this is a build artifact directory (generated code). Not hand-authored product code. Relationship to dataconnect/ dir: dataconnect/ holds .gql schema source; src/dataconnect-generated/ holds the compiled SDK output. No Claude-Code-adjacent artifacts found.

name: styles
purpose: Global CSS entry point — single globals.css file for project-wide baseline styles.
notes: Minimal dir: 1 file (globals.css). Note: app/globals.css also exists at top level of app/ — two globals.css files in project. Possible duplication or intentional split (app-router-level vs global). No Claude-Code-adjacent artifacts found.

name: public
purpose: Next.js static asset directory — fonts, images, Leaflet map marker icons, and a manifest JSON for PWA support.
notes: 37 files. Largest by disk size (12M) due to images. Dominant extensions: jpg (20), png (10), woff2 (2), svg (2), json (1). Fonts: 2 woff2 (handlee-latin, rock-salt-latin). images/ subdir contains product photos and Gemini-generated images (filenames include 'gemini-generated-image-*'). leaflet-icons/ contains 4 PNG marker files for map feature. No Claude-Code-adjacent artifacts found.

name: types
purpose: Top-level shared TypeScript type declarations — single journal.ts file with shared types.
notes: Minimal dir: 1 file (types/journal.ts). Note: lib/types/ also exists as a subdir — types appear split between top-level types/ (shared declarations) and lib/types/ (runtime-adjacent types). Possible consolidation candidate. No Claude-Code-adjacent artifacts found.

name: data
purpose: Static application data (TS modules) plus ecosystem-v2 operational JSONL logs — glossary, local-resources, recovery-quotes, slogans, and a runtime health/enforcement tracking subdirectory.
notes: 12 files (6 jsonl, 4 ts, 2 archived). Top-level: 4 .ts data files (glossary.ts, local-resources.ts, recovery-quotes.ts, slogans.ts). ecosystem-v2/ subdir contains 5 JSONL operational logs (deferred-items, ecosystem-health-log, enforcement-manifest, invocations, test-registry, warnings) plus archive/ with 2 dated .archived-20260318 files. This is runtime tracking state for the SoNash ecosystem health system — not static application data. Red flag: ecosystem-v2/ JSONL logs may be machine-specific state that should be gitignored. No Claude-Code-adjacent artifacts found.

name: dataconnect
purpose: Firebase DataConnect schema and connector definitions — GQL schema source and example connector with mutations/queries.
notes: 12 files (10 gql, 2 yaml). 2 subdirs: schema/ (schema.gql) and example/ (connector.yaml, mutations.gql, queries.gql). Source of truth for src/dataconnect-generated/ SDK output. The relationship: dataconnect/ = GQL source definitions; src/dataconnect-generated/ = compiled TypeScript client SDK. No Claude-Code-adjacent artifacts found.
